title: Misleading wire inputs its own output
body:
Compilation of the following module results in an error: `%Error: Wire inputs its own output, creating circular logic (wire x=x)`
```SystemVerilog
module a();
    or b(j, j, j);
endmodule: a
```

Options: `--cc --exe testbench.cpp --timing -Wno-fatal +1800-2023ext+sv`

### Expected Behavior
SystemVerilog does not prohibit circular logic, so the error message could perhaps include the UNSUPPORTED tag or indicate that this is bad practice instead of outright rejecting the code

This issue occurs in `Verilator 5.030 2024-10-27 rev v5.030-45-g2cb1a8de7`

Found by a [verilog model](https://github.com/DepTyCheck/verilog-model) using [deptycheck](https://github.com/buzden/deptycheck)
